manifest.author: Mikhail Savin
manifest.name: Vault Full Statistics
manifest.description: Vault statistics in the status bar plus a dedicated view with own/source ratio and a 30-day sparkline of how your knowledge base evolves.

manifest.author: Roger Deng
manifest.name: Vault Inspector
manifest.description: Scan your vault for maintenance problems: broken links, orphan attachments, duplicate files, frontmatter inconsistencies, unused tags, and large files.

manifest.author: Allan Engelhardt
manifest.name: Vault Intelligence
manifest.description: Research your vault with an AI agent powered by Google Gemini, discover related notes through semantic search, and analyze specific documents with contextual note referencing.

manifest.author: Tom Han
manifest.name: VaultLlama
manifest.description: Local AI chat using Ollama with safe context controls.

manifest.author: Brians Tjipto
manifest.name: Vault LLM Assistant
manifest.description: Uses AI to answer questions and create notes about your vault with proper citations

manifest.author: @gapmiss
manifest.name: Vault Name
manifest.description: Display and customize the vault name (title) in the side navigation file explorer.

manifest.author: @rscopic
manifest.name: Vault Nickname
manifest.description: Override the vault's display name and/or title order. Intended to disambiguate vaults with the same folder name when adhering to a common folder structure between projects.

manifest.author: Sebastian Hanke
manifest.name: Vault Operator
manifest.description: Agentic AI operating layer for your vault. Discovers and uses installed plugins, maintains persistent unified memory, and adapts to your workflows, skills and tools with full safety controls.

manifest.author: DejanDj79
manifest.name: Vault Palette
manifest.description: Customize folder, file, and tag colors.

manifest.author: one-wheeled-driver
manifest.name: Vault Passport
manifest.description: Give your notes a passport to the outside world. Exports documents to polished PDFs, resolving [[wiki-links]] into proper citations so they stand alone without the vault.

manifest.author: Jacob Bakholm
manifest.name: Vault Plus
manifest.description: Vault health dashboard — orphans, broken links, empty and oversized notes, duplicates, unused tags, unreferenced attachments — with one-click fixes.

manifest.author: Stefmf
manifest.name: Vault Pulse
manifest.description: A GitHub-style activity heatmap of your vault's file activity across the last 365 days.

manifest.author: Alexander
manifest.name: Vault Review
manifest.description: Randomly review your vault and track progress.

manifest.author: Eray Aydın
manifest.name: VaultSearch
manifest.description: Local-first hybrid search for your vault — combines keyword (BM25), semantic (vector embeddings), and fuzzy title matching. Multilingual, on-device, no cloud.

manifest.author: Bob Hyman
manifest.name: Vault Share
manifest.description: Share vaults between devices and users through Google Drive.

manifest.author: Technerium
manifest.name: Vault Size History
manifest.description: Graph of the number of files in the Vault.

manifest.author: Obsidian
manifest.name: Vault Stats
manifest.description: Provides methods to retrieve statistics about the vault, such as the number of notes, total word count, recently modified notes, and more.

manifest.author: caesarloo
manifest.name: Vault SVN
manifest.description: Manage SVN working copies inside your vault. Desktop-only: executes system svn CLI commands via shell (child_process) and accesses filesystem directly.

manifest.author: Justin Bird
manifest.name: VaultSync
manifest.description: Sync vault with cloud storage provider.

manifest.author: Andrew Boldi
manifest.name: Vault Sync (REST)
manifest.description: Two-way sync with a GitHub repo via REST API. Works on iOS for vaults of any size including images, where git-protocol plugins crash from WebView memory limits.

manifest.author: Toto Tvalavadze
manifest.name: Vault Tasks
manifest.description: Collects Markdown tasks from every note into a grouped task view.

manifest.author: Rafael Mehdiyev
manifest.name: Vault Time Tracker
manifest.description: Track time spent on notes. Timer keeps running even when app is running on background.

manifest.author: barkstone2
manifest.name: Vault to blog
manifest.description: Publish the vault to a GitHub Pages blog.

manifest.author: ImaginaryProgramming
manifest.name: Vault Transfer
manifest.description: Copies a note, and pastes it into another vault.

manifest.author: grumpydev
manifest.name: Vaultbox
manifest.description: Sync your vault directly with a selected Dropbox folder on desktop and mobile.

manifest.author: Kevin Pulikkottil
manifest.name: VaultChat
manifest.description: Multi-provider AI chat with file reading, editing, creation, and deletion. Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, Google Gemini, OpenRouter, and Ollama.

manifest.author: romejoe
manifest.name: VaultCrypt
manifest.description: Inline encryption for sensitive fields in notes using KeePass-compatible (.kdbx) storage.

manifest.author: Uthvah
manifest.name: VaultGuard
manifest.description: A secure, beautiful, and minimalist lockscreen.

manifest.author: Peter Sedmak
manifest.name: VaultGuard Sync
manifest.description: End-to-end encrypted sync with per-file permissions and audit logging via an AWS backend. Replaces standard file sync for teams that need compliance-grade vault security. Desktop and mobile; agent bridge is desktop-only.

manifest.author: Andy-Stack
manifest.name: Vaultkeeper AI
manifest.description: Multi-AI assistant. Read, search, create, and edit notes with multiple AI providers.

manifest.author: Meibbo
manifest.name: Vaultman
manifest.description: Files, content and frontmatter explorer like Bases with scoped queued changes list.

manifest.author: Baris Dincer
manifest.name: VaultPrune - Unused Attachment Cleaner
manifest.description: Scan your vault for attachments that are no longer referenced and review them before moving them to trash.

manifest.author: Bob Stanton
manifest.name: VaultQuery
manifest.description: Execute SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE statements on notes, properties, tasks, tables, headings and links.

manifest.author: Roland Broekema
manifest.name: VCF Contacts
manifest.description: Effortlessly manage, organize, and interact with your contacts. Import, export, and structure vCard (VCF) files seamlessly while keeping all contact details accessible in your knowledge base. Includes click-to-call, right-click copy, structured metadata, and more!

manifest.author: Zhou Hua
manifest.name: vConsole
manifest.description: Integrate vConsole for developers to facilitate the debugging of mobile plugins.

manifest.author: Ashwin A Murali
manifest.name: Vector Search
manifest.description: Semantic search for your notes using Ollama and nomic-embed-text embeddings. Requires Ollama installation.

manifest.author: Kornelius Paede
manifest.name: Verovio Music Renderer
manifest.description: Rendering, playback and export of MEI, MusicXML, ABC and PAE music notation files and embeds.

manifest.author: Janis Ringli
manifest.name: Verse of the Day
manifest.description: Lets you add the verse of the day from YouVersion to your daily notes
